title: avenula arundana
intro: Avenula arundana, also known as False Oat-grass, is a perennial plant species belonging to the grass family, native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Avenula arundana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
